prediction.reasoning: The point estimate assumes the price will remain near its current level in the absence of specific new information for the next three days. The confidence intervals are theoretical estimates derived by applying a generalized daily volatility of approximately 1.5% over a three-day period, using a log-normal distribution model. These estimates do not account for real-time market news, company-specific events, broader economic factors, or historical performance patterns of ADI, all of which can significantly influence actual price movements.
